title: Hewlett Packard Still Has An Upside
text: Hewlett Packard is a company I've been writing about in the past - and intend to write on here again. The company has an upside to any sort of long-term fair value - and I'm going to show you what HPE can offer you, at this time, if you invest.

text: LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today unveiled platform enhancements and new cloud services for HPE GreenLake, the company's flagship offering that enables organizations to modernize all their applications and data. This includes a reimagined modern private cloud that provides a cloud-native experience to power an organization's hybrid strategy, regardless of location. title: New Hewlett Packard Enterprise Partner Program Fuels As-a-Service Growth for Global Partner Ecosystem
text: LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--HPE Global Partner Summit 2022 – Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced a new partner program, HPE Partner Ready Vantage. Building upon the award winning HPE Partner Ready program, HPE Partner Ready Vantage is purpose-built to help partners adjust to and thrive in today's changing market. text: ISTANBUL--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Eclit has selected the HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform to launch a new cloud portfolio and expand its infrastructure as a service and managed IT services offering. title: Iliane Selects HPE GreenLake for Expansion of High Performing Cloud Offerings
text: PARIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Iliane, a French cloud services and hosting service provider, has selected the HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform to accelerate the deployment of their cloud offerings for regional accounts. title: Swedish Cloud Service Provider, Datarewind, Boosts Hybrid Office Productivity with HPE Cloud-Native Storage and Enhanced Compute Capacities
text: STOCKHOLM--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Datarewind, a Swedish IT service provider, has selected HPE Alletra cloud-native data infrastructure and high-performing, versatile HPE ProLiant servers to host virtual machines on behalf of its clients. title: Taeknizon Selects HPE GreenLake to Expand their Fully Managed Cloud Offering in the UAE
text: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Taeknizon, a private cloud service provider focused on Asia and the Middle East, has selected the HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform to further expand its operations in the UAE. This partnership with HPE will enable Taeknizon to meet growing demand from end customers and elastically scale up services in line with demand. title: HPE stock dives after earnings and sales miss amid ‘inflationary environment and ongoing supply chain disruptions'
